nasb.text: and Reu lived two hundred and seven years after he became the father of Serug, and he had other sons and daughters.

esv.text: And Reu lived after he fathered Serug 207 years and had other sons and daughters.

cnv.text: 拉吳生西鹿以後，又活了二百零七年，並且生了其他的兒女。

ccb.text: 之后又活了二百零七年，生儿育女。

csbs.text: 拉吴生了西鹿之后，又活了两百零七年，并且生了其他的儿女。
